_meta.description: 70 chat-engine evaluation scenarios (35 user + 35 admin) with DB ground-truth queries and expected reply substrings.

user.question: What is my SIA ID and registered name?
user.ground_truth_sql: select display_id || '|' || coalesce(name,'') from users where id=280

user.question: What is my registered email and phone number?
user.ground_truth_sql: select coalesce(email,'') || '|' || coalesce(phone,'') from users where id=280

user.question: What is my current KYC status?
user.ground_truth_sql: select kyc_status::text from users where id=280

user.question: What is my account status — active or blocked?
user.ground_truth_sql: select status from users where id=280

user.question: Who is my sponsor / referrer user id?
user.ground_truth_sql: select coalesce(referrer_user_id::text,'none') from users where id=280

user.question: What is my main wallet balance right now?
user.ground_truth_sql: select balance::text from user_balances where user_id=280

user.question: Show me all my wallet balances — main, spot, other and team royalty.
user.ground_truth_sql: select balance::text||'|'||spot_balance::text||'|'||other_balance::text||'|'||team_royalty_balance::text from user_balances where user_id=280

user.question: What is my spot wallet balance?
user.ground_truth_sql: select spot_balance::text from user_balances where user_id=280

user.question: What is my team royalty wallet balance?
user.ground_truth_sql: select team_royalty_balance::text from user_balances where user_id=280

user.question: How many packages have I purchased so far?
user.ground_truth_sql: select count(*)::text from purchases where user_id=280

user.question: List the names of all packages I have ever purchased.
user.ground_truth_sql: select string_agg(distinct pk.name, ', ') from purchases p join packages pk on pk.id=p.package_id where p.user_id=280

user.question: Which of my package purchases are still in pending status?
user.ground_truth_sql: select string_agg(pk.name, ', ') from purchases p join packages pk on pk.id=p.package_id where p.user_id=280 and p.status='pending'

user.question: What was the price of my Share Market Learning purchase?
user.ground_truth_sql: select amount::text from purchases where user_id=280 and package_id=4 limit 1

user.question: How many withdrawal requests have I raised in total?
user.ground_truth_sql: select count(*)::text from withdraw_requests where user_id=280

user.question: Do I currently have any pending withdrawal requests?
user.ground_truth_sql: select count(*)::text from withdraw_requests where user_id=280 and status='pending'

user.question: How many of my withdrawal requests have been approved so far?
user.ground_truth_sql: select count(*)::text from withdraw_requests where user_id=280 and status='approved'

user.question: What is the total approved withdrawal amount across all my requests?
user.ground_truth_sql: select coalesce(sum(amount),0)::text from withdraw_requests where user_id=280 and status='approved'

user.question: What is the total credit amount I have received in my wallet so far (sum of positive wallet transactions)?
user.ground_truth_sql: select coalesce(sum(amount),0)::text from wallet_transactions where receiver_user_id=280 and amount>0

user.question: Roughly how many wallet transactions are recorded against my account?
user.ground_truth_sql: select count(*)::text from wallet_transactions where receiver_user_id=280

user.question: How many direct referrals (direct legs) do I have?
user.ground_truth_sql: select count(*)::text from users where referrer_user_id=280

user.question: What is my total downline size (across all levels, excluding myself)?
user.ground_truth_sql: select count(*)::text from user_tree_paths where ancestor_id=280 and depth>0

user.question: How deep does my upline chain go (number of ancestors above me)?
user.ground_truth_sql: select count(*)::text from user_tree_paths where descendant_id=280 and depth>0

user.question: How many pending commission entries are recorded for me as the receiver?
user.ground_truth_sql: select count(*)::text from pending_commissions where receiver_user_id=280

user.question: How many packages does the SIA platform offer in total?
user.ground_truth_sql: select count(*)::text from packages

user.question: What is the price of the Digital Marketing package?
user.ground_truth_sql: select price::text from packages where name='Digital Marketing'

user.question: What is the price of the highest tier package on SIA?
user.ground_truth_sql: select price::text from packages order by price desc limit 1

user.question: How many MLM levels are configured in the system?
user.ground_truth_sql: select count(*)::text from levels

user.question: What is the title of the highest level in SIA MLM?
user.ground_truth_sql: select title from levels order by level desc limit 1

user.question: Briefly explain the difference between upline and downline in SIA MLM.
user.ground_truth_sql: select 'concept'

user.question: What are the different types of wallets in SIA MLM and what does each one represent?
user.ground_truth_sql: select 'concept'

user.question: How does direct commission get calculated when someone in my downline buys a package?
user.ground_truth_sql: select 'concept'

user.question: What is the typical end-to-end flow when I raise a withdrawal request?
user.ground_truth_sql: select 'concept'

user.question: What does a P2P transfer mean and which wallet does it use?
user.ground_truth_sql: select 'concept'

user.question: Why do I need KYC and what happens if my KYC is not approved?
user.ground_truth_sql: select 'concept'

user.question: How can I increase my level in the SIA MLM hierarchy — what is required?
user.ground_truth_sql: select 'concept'

user.question: Mere 7500 wala English Speaking-III (package id 2) me pichhle 5 dino kitna SELF + GLOBAL income aaya hai?
user.ground_truth_sql: select coalesce(sum(le.amount),0)::text from ledger_entries le join purchases p on p.id=le.purchase_id where le.receiver_user_id=280 and p.package_id=2 and le.commission_type in ('SELF','GLOBAL_HELPING') and le.credited_at >= now() - interval '5 days'

user.question: Pichhle 5 dino me mera total SELF + GLOBAL income kitna hai across all packages?
user.ground_truth_sql: select coalesce(sum(amount),0)::text from ledger_entries where receiver_user_id=280 and commission_type in ('SELF','GLOBAL_HELPING') and credited_at >= now() - interval '5 days'

user.question: Agla withdrawal date kab hai aur us din kaunse wallets allowed hain?
user.ground_truth_sql: select 'logic_check'

user.question: Agle withdrawal date pe main exactly kitna amount apply / withdraw kar sakta hu?
user.ground_truth_sql: select (spot_balance + other_balance + team_royalty_balance)::text from user_balances where user_id=280

user.question: Mere ab tak kitne withdrawal requests approved aur kitne rejected hue hain?
user.ground_truth_sql: select string_agg(status::text || '=' || count::text, ',') from (select status, count(*)::int as count from withdraw_requests where user_id=280 group by status) t

user.question: Mera total downline network kitna bada hai (sab depths milake)?
user.ground_truth_sql: select count(*)::text from user_tree_paths where ancestor_id=280 and depth>0

user.question: Mere kitne direct referrals hain (level-1 wale)?
user.ground_truth_sql: select count(*)::text from users where referrer_user_id=280

user.question: Pichhle 30 dino me total MONTHLY recurring income kitna mila hai?
user.ground_truth_sql: select coalesce(sum(amount),0)::text from ledger_entries where receiver_user_id=280 and commission_type='MONTHLY' and credited_at >= now() - interval '30 days'

user.question: Pichhle 30 dino me total SPOT income kitni aayi?
user.ground_truth_sql: select coalesce(sum(amount),0)::text from ledger_entries where receiver_user_id=280 and commission_type='SPOT' and credited_at >= now() - interval '30 days'

user.question: Mere 2500 wale package (English Speaking Basic-I, package id 1) se ab tak total kitni income aayi hai (lifetime)?
user.ground_truth_sql: select coalesce(sum(le.amount),0)::text from ledger_entries le join purchases p on p.id=le.purchase_id where le.receiver_user_id=280 and p.package_id=1

user.question: Pichhle 7 din ka mera net income (saare types ka sum) kitna hai?
user.ground_truth_sql: select coalesce(sum(amount),0)::text from ledger_entries where receiver_user_id=280 and credited_at >= now() - interval '7 days'

user.question: Is mahine (April 2026) ki MONTHLY recurring income kitni mili hai abhi tak?
user.ground_truth_sql: select coalesce(sum(amount),0)::text from ledger_entries where receiver_user_id=280 and commission_type='MONTHLY' and credited_at >= date_trunc('month', now() at time zone 'Asia/Kolkata')

user.question: English Speaking-III (package id 2) ka mera SPOT income lifetime kitna mila hai?
user.ground_truth_sql: select coalesce(sum(le.amount),0)::text from ledger_entries le join purchases p on p.id=le.purchase_id where le.receiver_user_id=280 and p.package_id=2 and le.commission_type='SPOT'

admin.question: How many total users are registered on the SIA platform right now?
admin.ground_truth_sql: select count(*)::text from users

admin.question: How many active (non-blocked) users are there in the system?
admin.ground_truth_sql: select count(*)::text from users where status='active'

admin.question: How many users have an approved KYC status?
admin.ground_truth_sql: select count(*)::text from users where kyc_status='approved'

admin.question: How many MLM packages are currently configured?
admin.ground_truth_sql: select count(*)::text from packages

admin.question: How many levels are defined in the level master table?
admin.ground_truth_sql: select count(*)::text from levels

admin.question: How many withdrawal requests are sitting in the pending bucket right now?
admin.ground_truth_sql: select count(*)::text from withdraw_requests where status='pending'

admin.question: How many withdrawal requests have been approved across the platform till date?
admin.ground_truth_sql: select count(*)::text from withdraw_requests where status='approved'

admin.question: How many withdrawal requests have been rejected so far?
admin.ground_truth_sql: select count(*)::text from withdraw_requests where status='rejected'

admin.question: How many package purchases (rows in purchases) exist in the database?
admin.ground_truth_sql: select count(*)::text from purchases

admin.question: How many pending commission entries are sitting in the system in total?
admin.ground_truth_sql: select count(*)::text from pending_commissions

admin.question: How many wallet transaction rows exist across all users (rough magnitude is fine)?
admin.ground_truth_sql: select count(*)::text from wallet_transactions

admin.question: Pull profile details for SIA00299 — name, email, phone, status.
admin.ground_truth_sql: select display_id||'|'||coalesce(name,'')||'|'||coalesce(email,'')||'|'||coalesce(phone,'')||'|'||status from users where display_id='SIA00299'

admin.question: What is the KYC status of user SIA00299?
admin.ground_truth_sql: select kyc_status::text from users where display_id='SIA00299'

admin.question: How many direct referrals does SIA00299 have?
admin.ground_truth_sql: select count(*)::text from users where referrer_user_id=280

admin.question: What is the total downline size of SIA00299 (excluding the user himself)?
admin.ground_truth_sql: select count(*)::text from user_tree_paths where ancestor_id=280 and depth>0

admin.question: What is the main wallet balance of SIA00299?
admin.ground_truth_sql: select balance::text from user_balances where user_id=280

admin.question: How many package purchases has SIA00299 made?
admin.ground_truth_sql: select count(*)::text from purchases where user_id=280

admin.question: How many withdrawal requests has SIA00299 raised in total?
admin.ground_truth_sql: select count(*)::text from withdraw_requests where user_id=280

admin.question: Has SIA00299 paid for the Graphic Designing & Video Editing package, and what is its status?
admin.ground_truth_sql: select status from purchases where user_id=280 and package_id=5 limit 1

admin.question: Which package is the highest priced on SIA and what is its price?
admin.ground_truth_sql: select name||'|'||price::text from packages order by price desc limit 1

admin.question: Which package is the cheapest on SIA and what is its price?
admin.ground_truth_sql: select name||'|'||price::text from packages order by price asc limit 1

admin.question: What is the price of the Digital Marketing package?
admin.ground_truth_sql: select price::text from packages where name='Digital Marketing'

admin.question: What is the title of level 0 and level 9 in the level master?
admin.ground_truth_sql: select string_agg(level::text||':'||title, ', ' order by level) from levels where level in (0,9)

admin.question: List the titles for levels 1 through 4 in the SIA MLM level master.
admin.ground_truth_sql: select string_agg(title, ', ' order by level) from levels where level between 1 and 4

admin.question: Who currently has the highest number of direct referrals on the platform — give their SIA ID and count?
admin.ground_truth_sql: select u.display_id||'|'||cnt::text from (select referrer_user_id, count(*) as cnt from users where referrer_user_id is not null group by referrer_user_id order by cnt desc limit 1) t join users u on u.id=t.referrer_user_id

admin.question: How big is SIA00111's downline (descendants count, excluding self)?
admin.ground_truth_sql: select count(*)::text from user_tree_paths utp join users u on u.id=utp.ancestor_id where u.display_id='SIA00111' and utp.depth>0

admin.question: Explain what a pending commission row in the database represents and when it gets cleared.
admin.ground_truth_sql: select 'concept'

admin.question: Walk me through the lifecycle of a withdrawal request from creation to approval/rejection.
admin.ground_truth_sql: select 'concept'

admin.question: What is the difference between purchases and pending_commissions tables in this system?
admin.ground_truth_sql: select 'concept'

admin.question: Explain the role of the user_tree_paths closure table — what does each row mean?
admin.ground_truth_sql: select 'concept'

admin.question: What types of wallets exist for each user in the system and how are they used?
admin.ground_truth_sql: select 'concept'

admin.question: What does it mean when a user is marked as is_disqualified=true in the users table?
admin.ground_truth_sql: select 'concept'

admin.question: What are the cron jobs or scheduled jobs running in the SIA MLM system?
admin.ground_truth_sql: select 'concept'

admin.question: Explain what the legacy_activation_history and legacy_spot_history tables are used for.
admin.ground_truth_sql: select 'concept'

admin.question: Can an admin manually adjust a user's wallet, and if yes, where is that recorded?
admin.ground_truth_sql: select 'concept'

admin.question: Top 3 referrers kaun hain — kis user ke sabse zyada direct referrals hain?
admin.ground_truth_sql: select string_agg(u.display_id || '=' || t.cnt::text, ',') from (select referrer_user_id, count(*) as cnt from users where referrer_user_id is not null group by referrer_user_id order by cnt desc limit 3) t join users u on u.id=t.referrer_user_id

admin.question: Total approved KYC users kitne hain abhi system me?
admin.ground_truth_sql: select count(*)::text from users where kyc_status='approved'

admin.question: Total pending KYC users kitne hain?
admin.ground_truth_sql: select count(*)::text from users where kyc_status='pending'

admin.question: Pichhle 30 dino me kitne approved withdrawal requests pass hue aur unka total amount kya hai?
admin.ground_truth_sql: select count(*)::text || '|' || coalesce(sum(amount),0)::text from withdraw_requests where status='approved' and created_at >= now() - interval '30 days'

admin.question: Admin POV: agle withdrawal date par mere paas approximately kitni amount ki withdrawal demand aa sakti hai (upper bound)?
admin.ground_truth_sql: select (sum(ub.spot_balance)+sum(ub.other_balance)+sum(ub.team_royalty_balance))::text from user_balances ub join users u on u.id=ub.user_id where u.status='active' and u.withdrawal_blocked=false and u.kyc_status='approved'

admin.question: User SIA00299 ki agle withdrawal date pe eligible withdrawal amount kya hai?
admin.ground_truth_sql: select (spot_balance + other_balance + team_royalty_balance)::text from user_balances where user_id=280

admin.question: User SIA00299 ka total downline network size kitna hai?
admin.ground_truth_sql: select count(*)::text from user_tree_paths where ancestor_id=280 and depth>0

admin.question: User SIA00299 ke total kitne direct referrals hain?
admin.ground_truth_sql: select count(*)::text from users where referrer_user_id=280

admin.question: User SIA00111 ka 7500 wale English Speaking-III package se SELF income lifetime kitna mila hai?
admin.ground_truth_sql: select coalesce(sum(le.amount),0)::text from ledger_entries le join purchases p on p.id=le.purchase_id where le.receiver_user_id=(select id from users where display_id='SIA00111') and p.package_id=2 and le.commission_type='SELF'

admin.question: Globally rejected withdrawal requests kitne hain aur unka total amount kya hai?
admin.ground_truth_sql: select count(*)::text || '|' || coalesce(sum(amount),0)::text from withdraw_requests where status='rejected'

admin.question: Agla withdrawal date kab hai aur us din kaunse wallets opened hote hain?
admin.ground_truth_sql: select 'logic_check'

admin.question: User SIA00299 ka pichhle 30 dino me sirf MONTHLY recurring income type ka kitna paisa credit hua?
admin.ground_truth_sql: select coalesce(sum(amount),0)::text from ledger_entries where receiver_user_id=280 and commission_type='MONTHLY' and credited_at >= now() - interval '30 days'
